subcodes.first_line: We make mention of those who have believed in God, the Peerless, the All-Informed, and give them glad-tidings of that which hath been ordained for them in the Most Exalted Kingdom. He verily is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر الذین آمنوا بالله الفرد الخبیر و نبشرهم بما قدر لهم فی الملکوت الاعلی انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the power of words; of speech, @contention and conflict
